profile.summary: B2B content marketer with SEO, newsletters, and case studies.

jobDescription: Stackline Tools wants a Content Marketing Lead to own SEO strategy, ship weekly newsletter content, and produce customer case studies. HubSpot experience and clear B2B copywriting required.
cvText:
Casey Nguyen
Content Marketing Manager

Experience:
- Content Manager at Orbit CRM (2020-2025)
- Grew organic traffic via SEO briefs and blog cadence
- Wrote customer case studies and a biweekly product newsletter
- Administered HubSpot CMS and email journeys

Skills: SEO, content strategy, HubSpot, copywriting, analytics
Education: BA English, Harbor University
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the Content Marketing Lead role at Stackline Tools. At Orbit CRM I owned SEO briefs, blog cadence, customer case studies, and a biweekly newsletter, working daily in HubSpot.

I would like to bring that B2B content discipline to your growth engine.

Sincerely,
Casey Nguyen
